front.title: Signed Authorization-Evidence Records for WIMSE-Authorized AI Agent Actions

abstract.t: This document specifies a companion profile to the AI Agent Authentication and Authorization draft [I-D.klrc-aiagent-auth], defining a signed authorization-evidence record produced by WIMSE- authorized AI agent actions. The evidence record (referred to as a Permit) commits cryptographically to the canonical request bytes dispatched after authorization, satisfies the audit minimum requirements enumerated in Section 11 of the companion draft, and composes with HTTP Message Signatures, OAuth access tokens, and Shared Signals Framework eventing without requiring modifications to those existing standards. The profile is anchored in the SCITT profile defined in [I-D.munoz-scitt-permit-profile].
